endpoint.description: Endpoint to send data to. The contents vary with the `protocol`.

protocol.description: Protocol to use. Protocols `email`, `email-json`, `http` and `https` are also valid but partially supported.

subscription_role_arn.description: (Required if `protocol` is `firehose`) ARN of the IAM role to publish to Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream.

topic_arn.description: ARN of the SNS topic to subscribe to.

confirmation_timeout_in_minutes.description: Integer indicating number of minutes to wait in retrying mode for fetching subscription arn before marking it as failure. Only applicable for http and https protocols.

delivery_policy.description: JSON String with the delivery policy (retries, backoff, etc.) that will be used in the subscription - this only applies to HTTP/S subscriptions.

endpoint_auto_confirms.description: Whether the endpoint is capable of auto confirming subscription (e.g., PagerDuty).

filter_policy.description: JSON String with the filter policy that will be used in the subscription to filter messages seen by the target resource.

raw_message_delivery.description: Whether to enable raw message delivery (the original message is directly passed, not wrapped in JSON with the original message in the message property).

redrive_policy.description: JSON String with the redrive policy that will be used in the subscription.

replay_policy.description: JSON String with the archived message replay policy that will be used in the subscription.
